name: 04 - Google Ads Campaign Type Daily → makcom_ads

variables.name: gaql_query
variables.value: SELECT segments.date, campaign.advertising_channel_type, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM campaign WHERE segments.date = '{{formatDate(addDays(now; -1); "YYYY-MM-DD")}}' AND campaign.status != 'REMOVED'

metadata.note: Same data store as scenarios 1-3. Record `config`: tenant_id, make_secret, api_base, google_customer_id, google_login_customer_id.

Insert (between modules 2 and 99): (3) Google Ads → Search [Customer ID = {{2.google_customer_id}}; Query = {{1.gaql_query}}]. (4) Numeric Aggregator [group by campaign.advertising_channel_type ; SUM clicks, cost_micros, conversions, conversions_value]. (5) Iterator over (4). (6) Set variables to map advertising_channel_type → display name (PERFORMANCE_MAX → 'Performance Max', SEARCH → 'Search', SHOPPING → 'Shopping', VIDEO → 'Video', DEMAND_GEN/DISCOVERY → 'Discovery', DISPLAY → 'Display'). (7) Array aggregator. Then replace REPLACE_WITH_ARRAY_AGGREGATOR_OUTPUT with {{7.array}}.

notes.content:
Phase 1 / Scenario 4: Google Ads by campaign type → POST /api/insights/google/campaign-type

Body row template (paste into the Array Aggregator's record builder):

{
  "date": "{{1.yesterday}}",
  "campaign_type": "{{6.display_name}}",
  "clicks": {{5.clicks}},
  "cost": "{{ 5.cost_micros / 1000000 }}",
  "purchases": {{ floor(5.conversions) }},
  "total_conv_value": "{{5.conversions_value}}",
  "roas": "{{ 5.conversions_value / (5.cost_micros / 1000000) }}"
}
